notes: Fullscreen issues on multiple display setup, on focus change to another app, the screen gets shrunk and cannot be restored. After fullscreen settings saving, you cannot change the resolution anymore.
title: Love Language Japanese

notes: The game runs, and the VN element seems to work perfectly. Sadly, the Japanese quizes are completely broken; either the answer or the question will not display. Since these are plot-critical the game is essentially unplayable.
title: Love Language Japanese

notes: It works quite perfectly except that doesn't show any japanese characters in the text and question buttons of the test, which makes this japanese learning game basically unplayable.
title: Love Language Japanese

notes:
The VN runs mostly fine, but it doesn't load movies/videos, as when I click start I get a black screen instead of the intro movie.

To fix the missing text issue you'll need to google and download a font called "msgothic.ttf" (I'm not sure if I can post the link here). Then, you'll need to find your Steam folder and paste the font file in here: Steam/steamapps/compatdata/445800/pfx/drive_c/windows/Fonts/. The text should display properly now. 
Please excuse my poor english and any grammatical errors.
title: Love Language Japanese

notes: You need to install msgothic.ttf per the instructions here, but after that it runs flawlessly.
title: Love Language Japanese
